सर्वाधिक सरासरी मासिक खर्च असलेल्या शीर्ष 10 मुस्लिम कुटुंबांची ओळख करा, विशेषतः ज्यांचा खर्च एकूण राष्ट्रीय सरासरीपेक्षा जास्त आहे.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Muslim' GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING AVG(T2.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) > (SELECT AVG(MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION) ORDER BY AVG(T2.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT 
    h.HOUSEHOLD_ID,
    f.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS,
    g.STATE,
    s.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY
FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD h
JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION f ON h.HOUSEHOLD_ID = f.HOUSEHOLD_ID
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY g ON f.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL s ON h.HOUSEHOLD_ID = s.HOUSEHOLD_ID

    SELECT AVG(MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS)

ORDER BY f.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS DESC
LIMIT 10;

question:

gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T2.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR, AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), SUM(T3.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_VILLAGE_INFRASTRUCTURE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T2.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR HAVING AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) > 329 ORDER BY SUM(T3.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC

    WHERE gh3.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL ILIKE 'Rural'
